# Data Model: mos_target_mastar_goodstars_parquet


MOS Target Table: mastar_goodstars

- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)

## Basic Information
Summary file of MaNGA Stellar Library.

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_mastar_goodstars.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
940 KB

### File Type
PARQUET

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### DATAFRAME List for release DR20
- Primary data frame.

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example DATAFRAME List

### Columns


#### drpver

- Column Name: drpver
- Description: Version of mangadrp.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### mprocver

- Column Name: mprocver
- Description: Version of mastarproc.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### mangaid

- Column Name: mangaid
- Description: MaNGA-ID for the target.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### minmjd

- Column Name: minmjd
- Description: Minimum Modified Julian Date of Observations.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### maxmjd

- Column Name: maxmjd
- Description: Maximum Modified Julian Date of Observations.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nvisits

- Column Name: nvisits
- Description: Number of visits for this star (including good and bad observations).
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### nplates

- Column Name: nplates
- Description: Number of plates this star is on.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### ra

- Column Name: ra
- Description: Right Ascension for this object at the time given by the EPOCH column (Equinox J2000).
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### dec

- Column Name: dec
- Description: Declination for this object at the time given by the EPOCH column (Equinox J2000).
- Unit: deg
- Data Type: Float64


#### epoch

- Column Name: epoch
- Description: Epoch of the astrometry (which is approximate for some catalogs).
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### psfmag_1

- Column Name: psfmag_1
- Description: PSF magnitude in the first band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### psfmag_2

- Column Name: psfmag_2
- Description: PSF magnitude in the second band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### psfmag_3

- Column Name: psfmag_3
- Description: PSF magnitude in the third band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### psfmag_4

- Column Name: psfmag_4
- Description: PSF magnitude in the fourth band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### psfmag_5

- Column Name: psfmag_5
- Description: PSF magnitude in the fifth band with the filter correspondence depending on PHOTOCAT.
- Unit: mag
- Data Type: Float32


#### mngtarg2

- Column Name: mngtarg2
- Description: MANGA_TARGET2 targeting bitmask.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Int32


#### input_logg

- Column Name: input_logg
- Description: Surface gravity in the input catalog (with some adjustment made).
- Unit: log(cm/s^2)
- Data Type: Float32


#### input_teff

- Column Name: input_teff
- Description: Effective temperature in the input catalog (with some adjustment made).
- Unit: K
- Data Type: Float32


#### input_fe_h

- Column Name: input_fe_h
- Description: [Fe/H] in the input catalog (with some adjustment made).
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### input_alpha_m

- Column Name: input_alpha_m
- Description: [alpha/M] in the input catalog (with some adjustment made).
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: Float32


#### input_source

- Column Name: input_source
- Description: Source catalog for stellar parameters.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


#### photocat

- Column Name: photocat
- Description: Source of astrometry and photometry.
- Unit: N/A
- Data Type: String


---
## Notes
None
